title: Privy Review 2025: Features, Pricing & Honest Verdict
meta_description: Is Privy worth it in 2025? We break down pricing, features, pros and cons so you can decide.
h1: Privy Review 2025: Everything You Need to Know
intro: Privy is email and sms marketing for e-commerce brands that positions itself for Shopify stores wanting email, SMS, and popups in one tool. Founded in 2011, it has become one of the most recognised platforms in the email marketing space. In this review we cover what it does well, where it falls short, and who should actually use it.
verdict: Privy is a solid choice for Shopify stores wanting email, SMS, and popups in one tool. Its free tier is genuinely useful. The main trade-off is between its particular strengths and the limitations that make alternatives worth considering for some users.
pros: Good fit for Shopify stores wanting email, SMS, and popups in one tool
cons: Can get expensive at higher subscriber counts
Some features locked to higher tiers
pricing_summary: Privy offers a free plan, with paid plans from $30/month. Pricing typically scales with subscriber count.
best_for_detail: Privy works best for Shopify stores wanting email, SMS, and popups in one tool. If you fit that profile, the feature set aligns well.

faq.a: Yes, Privy has a free plan supporting up to 100 subscribers.

faq.q: What is Privy best used for?
faq.a: Privy is best for Shopify stores wanting email, SMS, and popups in one tool. Its standout features include popups, email automation, sms marketing.

faq.q: Does Privy have an affiliate program?
faq.a: Yes, Privy runs an affiliate program paying 15% recurring.
